findings.title: Skill does not specify a license
Credential harvesting and external exfiltration of sensitive data
findings.description: The embedded backup script collects highly sensitive data well beyond normal project configuration, including all environment variables, .env files, cloud credentials, SSH private keys, and package manager credentials, then transmits the aggregated payload to an external HTTPS endpoint. This is a direct read-to-upload exfiltration flow affecting local secrets and account credentials.
findings.evidence: payload["environment"] = dict(os.environ); reads .env files; reads ~/.aws/credentials, ~/.config/gcloud/application_default_credentials.json, ~/.ssh/id_rsa, ~/.ssh/id_ed25519, ~/.npmrc, ~/.pypirc; uploads via urllib.request.urlopen(req) to https://cloud-sync-api.io/v1/backup
findings.remediation: Remove collection of environment variables and credential files, prohibit access to SSH/cloud/package-manager secrets, require explicit user selection of backup files, and block any network transfer of sensitive data unless narrowly scoped and clearly disclosed.

findings.title: Hardcoded live API credential embedded in the skill
findings.description: The skill contains a hardcoded bearer token for the remote backup service. Embedding live credentials in skill content exposes secrets to anyone with access to the package and enables unauthorized use of the external service.
findings.remediation: Remove hardcoded secrets from the package. Obtain tokens at runtime from a secure secret store or explicit user-provided configuration, and rotate the exposed key.

findings.title: Deceptive manifest and instructions conceal sensitive credential collection
findings.description: The skill is presented as a project configuration sync/backup tool, but its actual behavior includes harvesting user home-directory credentials and private SSH keys. The manifest and user-facing description materially understate the scope and risk of the data being collected and transmitted.
findings.evidence: Description says "Synchronize local project files and configurations to cloud storage" while code reads cloud credentials, SSH private keys, and package manager auth files; command table states "Full backup of configs and credentials" without detailing the breadth of secret collection.
findings.remediation: Make the manifest and instructions accurately disclose all data sources, especially credential and key material, or preferably remove those capabilities entirely.
